title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma & other LLMs locally via a single CLI/API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, push, list models with async support and pydantic models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-user, RBAC, model management & plugins.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI REPL with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates for Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot backend adapter letting you point Copilot to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Raycast extension for Retrieval-Augmented Generation using Ollama embeddings & local vector DB.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds Ollama chat & code-generation panels with customizable prompts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for generating code, docs, and commit messages via Ollama with optional streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with recipes for function-calling, vision, fine-tuning, and edge deployment.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama supporting Kotlin, Scala, and Android via OkHttp.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template with session memory, model selector, and Docker packaging for Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for AI-assisted writing, summarization, and note Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions and generates images via Ollama backend.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled EC2 autoscaled Ollama cluster on AWS with EFS model cache.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio, serde, and native TLS; mirrors official SDK surface.
